_comment: Per-90 player foul rates for Detector B (free). fouls_p90 = fouls COMMITTED per 90 (FBref 'Fls' / 90, or API-Football). opp_draw_p90 (optional) = the opponent he's matched against drawing fouls per 90 (FBref 'Fld' / 90) — adds the winger-vs-fullback matchup lift. minutes_expected defaults to 85. Names are matched loosely (lowercased, suffix-stripped).
